name: Almond Poppyseed Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease or line a 12-cup muffin tin with muffin papers.
3. In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
4. In another bowl, whisk together the vegetable oil, milk, eggs, and almond extract until smooth.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just moistened.
6. Gently fold in the poppyseeds.
7. Divide the batter evenly among the muffin cups.
8. Bake for 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
